titleStmt.title: SII 29.143: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 143. (A.R. No. B. 601 of 1961-62.) MĀNVI, MANVI TALUK, RAICHUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a boulder known as Jīnagāra-baṇḍi.

It states that during the reign of Sadāśivarāya that mahāmaṇḍlēśvara aḷiya Rāmarāja, on the request of Timmoja, Bhadrōja and Koṇḍōja, exempted the barbers of the Rāyachūr area, from the payment of certain taxes with a view to wishing the welfare of the king.
The record is dated Śaka 1475, Pramādi, Chaitra, śu. 15. It corresponds to 1553 A.D., March 29, [Wednesday].

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ṁ . śubhamastu . gaṇādhipatayēnu nama(ḥ) . svasti jayābhya
daya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁgaḷu 1475 neya saluva pramādhinā
ma saṁvatsarada . cayitra śu 15lu śrīmanumahārājādhirāja rāja
paramēśvara śrīvīrasadāsivadēvamahārāyaru pruthvīrājyaṁgēvutaṁ
miralu śrīman(ṁ)mahāmaṁḍalēśvara Aḷiya rāmarājayadēvama
ha Arasugaḷu . tiṁmōja koṁḍōja bhadrōjanavara biṁnahavanu kēḷi . sadā
sivadēvamahārāyarige puṁṇyavāgi rācūrina sīmege saluva Ayidu
tra sīmeyoḷagāgi rāhuta nāviṁdarige nubhavisi birāḍa sidāya se
sa kōṭiya birāḍa suṁkadāgaḷa beḍukōlu yivu muṁtādunu sarvvamānyavā
gi harasevu yidake Ālāudu Āvubadu nijavarutaṁma taṁdetāya (sa)ṇivu
braṁhmākaḷuvārana Uyaridaḷi sahā(rada vi) varāhanu sārāvā (ka bhu) mane
(vadista) pāpakke hōharu
na ha(tya)da hōharu .
Digital edition of SII 29.143 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
